name: Actinomycetales infections and treatment
description: This cluster of papers focuses on the clinical and molecular aspects of Nocardiosis, including Nocardia spp., actinomycosis, mycetoma, antimicrobial susceptibility, transplant recipients, genomic sequencing, taxonomy, epidemiology, and clinical features. It provides insights into the risk factors, characteristics, outcomes, and management of Nocardia infections in various patient populations.
